properties.name: urlfetcher.domains
properties.description: Map of domain configurations for URL fetching. Supported strategies are HTTP, PROXIFIED, and PLAYWRIGHT.

properties.name: urlfetcher.thread-pool-size
properties.description: Thread pool size for asynchronous URL fetching

properties.name: urlfetcher.record.enabled
properties.description: Flag to enable or disable recording mode (for test purposes only)

properties.name: urlfetcher.record.destination-folder
properties.description: Destination folder for storing/retrieving recorded responses (used only in tests)

properties.name: urlfetcher.playwright-proxy-fallback-enabled
properties.description: When true, failed or empty Playwright fetches are replayed with the global proxy configuration.

properties.name: urlfetcher.playwright-proxy-required
properties.description: When true, Playwright starts every fetch through the global proxy.

properties.name: urlfetcher.proxy.scheme
properties.description: Global proxy scheme used by proxified HTTP and Playwright proxy fallback.

properties.name: urlfetcher.proxy.host
properties.description: Global proxy host used by proxified HTTP and Playwright proxy fallback.

properties.name: urlfetcher.proxy.port
properties.description: Global proxy port used by proxified HTTP and Playwright proxy fallback.

properties.name: urlfetcher.proxy.username
properties.description: Optional global proxy username used by proxified HTTP and Playwright proxy fallback.

properties.name: urlfetcher.proxy.password
properties.description: Optional global proxy password used by proxified HTTP and Playwright proxy fallback.

properties.name: urlfetcher.domains.*.strategy
properties.description: Fetch strategy for a configured domain. Supported values are HTTP, PROXIFIED, and PLAYWRIGHT.

properties.name: urlfetcher.domains.*.user-agent
properties.description: User agent sent when fetching a configured domain.

properties.name: urlfetcher.domains.*.timeout
properties.description: Request timeout in milliseconds for a configured domain.

properties.name: urlfetcher.domains.*.browser-channel
properties.description: Playwright browser channel used for a configured domain.

properties.name: urlfetcher.domains.*.retry-policy.max-retries
properties.description: Maximum retry count for a configured domain.

properties.name: urlfetcher.domains.*.retry-policy.delay-between-retries
properties.description: Delay between retries in milliseconds for a configured domain.
